channel.title: FindOO Blog — Financially Social
channel.description: Insights, analysis, and updates from India's first financial network. Covering mutual funds, insurance, wealth management, compliance, and the BFSI ecosystem.

item.title: Introducing FindOO — India's First Trust-Based Financial Network
item.description: FindOO connects investors, intermediaries, and issuers on a single verified platform. Discover how trust-first networking transforms the Indian BFSI ecosystem.
item.dc:creator: FindOO Editorial

item.title: TrustCircle IQ — How We Rank Your Professional Network
item.description: A deep dive into FindOO's patented affinity ranking algorithm that scores connections based on role relevance, trust proximity, activity resonance, and intent signals.
item.dc:creator: FindOO Editorial

item.title: Why BFSI Professionals Need a Dedicated Network
item.description: Generic professional networks fall short for financial services. Learn why India's BFSI ecosystem deserves a specialized platform with regulatory awareness and role-based features.
item.dc:creator: FindOO Editorial

item.title: Gamification in Professional Networking — XP, Badges, and Streaks
item.description: How FindOO uses gamification mechanics — experience points, achievement badges, weekly challenges, and login streaks — to drive meaningful professional engagement.
item.dc:creator: FindOO Editorial

item.title: The Showcase Marketplace — Products and Services for the BFSI Ecosystem
item.description: Explore FindOO's Showcase module where issuers list financial products and intermediaries offer professional services — with reviews, ratings, and smart suggestions.
item.dc:creator: FindOO Editorial
